'''√ng-dh-th''' ('''kangadhath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mailgram|mailgram]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-dh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mailgram|mailgram]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ng-dh-th
|-
! Lemma
| kangadhath
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thingadhath || jingadhath || shingadhath || kingadhath
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthungadhath || jujungadhath || shushungadhath || kukungadhath
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thungadhath || jungadhath || shungadhath || kungadhath
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thungadhath || jungadhath || shungadhath || kungadhath
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thengadhath || jengadhath || shengadhath || kengadhath
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothongadhath || jojongadhath || shoshongadhath || kokongadhath
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thongadhath || jongadhath || shongadhath || kongadhath
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thongadhath || jongadhath || shongadhath || kongadhath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngadhath || ngadhath || ngadhath || ngadhath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngadhath || ngadhath || ngadhath || ngadhath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngadhath || ngadhath || ngadhath || ngadhath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngadhath || ngadhath || ngadhath || ngadhath
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thængadhath || jængadhath || shængadhath || kængadhath
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathangadhath || jajangadhath || shashangadhath || kakangadhath
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thangadhath || jangadhath || shangadhath || kangadhath
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thangadhath || jangadhath || shangadhath || kangadhath
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shangadhath
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshangadhath
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishangadhath
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shangadhathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshangadhathnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishangadhathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shangadhathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshangadhathnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishangadhathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shangadhathro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshangadhathnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishangadhathro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shangadhathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshangadhathnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishangadhathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shangadhathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshangadhathnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishangadhathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shangadhathng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshangadhathnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishangadhathng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shangadhathya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshangadhathnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishangadhathya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shangadhathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshangadhathnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishangadhathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shangadhathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshangadhathnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishangadhathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shangadhathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangadhathnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangadhathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shangadhathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshangadhathnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangadhathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shangadhathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshangadhathnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishangadhathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shangadhathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangadhathnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangadhathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shangadhathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshangadhathnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangadhathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shangadhathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshangadhathnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishangadhathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shangadhathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshangadhathnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishangadhathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shangadhathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshangadhathnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangadhathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shangadhathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshangadhathnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishangadhathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shangadhathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshangadhathnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishangadhathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shangadhathmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangadhathnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangadhathmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
